fault_hypothesis: Line 71 uses `int(x)` (truncation) instead of a largest-remainder rounding method, so the sum of integer allocations does not equal the total when proportional shares are non-integer.

spec.expr: sum(int(x) for x in raw__1) == int(total)

constraints.intent: The sum of truncated integer allocations must equal the total; fails when fractional remainders are dropped.
Raw shares must sum exactly to total before rounding is applied.
Before using raw to compute integer results, its sum should equal total so rounding can preserve it.
The returned list of integer allocations must sum to the integer total.
